docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $845.00 FILED BY SHEERIN HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT U HAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEERIN HOWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT U HAUL PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR W/O NOTICE TO COURT. DEF PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR CT TO RULE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
